passed_checks.check_name: Ensure that the --authorization-mode argument includes RBAC
code_block:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-blue
  namespace: cb
  labels:
    app: web-blue
    color: blue
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-blue
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-blue
    spec:
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10001
        runAsGroup: 10001
        fsGroup: 10001
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
      - name: web
        image: bggatewayacr.azurecr.io/blue-green-gateway:v1.4.2
        imagePullPolicy: Always
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          capabilities:
            drop: ["ALL"]
        env:
        - name: DATABASE_URL
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: bg-gateway-secrets
              key: database-url
        volumeMounts:
        - name: secrets-mount
          mountPath: "/mnt/secrets"
          readOnly: true
        - name: tmp
          mountPath: /tmp
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: "1"
            memory: 1Gi
          requests:
            cpu: 250m
            memory: 512Mi
      volumes:
      - name: tmp
        emptyDir: {}
      - name: secrets-mount
        csi:
          driver: secrets-store.csi.k8s.io
          readOnly: true
          volumeAttributes:
            secretProviderClass: "bg-gateway-kv-secrets"
---

passed_checks.check_name: Ensure From Alias are unique for multistage builds.
code_block:
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1

FROM python:3.13-slim

WORKDIR /app

# Install uv
COPY --from=ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:latest /uv /usr/local/bin/uv

# Copy dependency files first for layer caching
COPY pyproject.toml uv.lock* ./

# Install dependencies (no dev deps in prod)
RUN uv sync --no-dev --frozen

# Copy application code
COPY . .

RUN groupadd -g 10001 app \
    && useradd -u 10001 -g app -m -d /home/app -s /usr/sbin/nologin app \
    && chown -R app:app /app /home/app

USER app

EXPOSE 8000

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=5s --start-period=10s --retries=3 \
  CMD ["uv", "run", "python", "-c", "import urllib.request; urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/state')"]

CMD ["uv", "run", "uvicorn", "main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8000"]

code_block:
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1
# =============================================================================
# Combined development/production deployment image running Vite + FastAPI
# in a single container.
#
# Runs:
#   • FastAPI backend on 127.0.0.1:8000 (uvicorn)
#   • Vite SSR frontend on 0.0.0.0:8080 (bun run dev)
# =============================================================================

FROM oven/bun:1-slim AS base

# Install system dependencies: Python 3, venv, supervisor
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        python3 \
        python3-pip \
        python3-venv \
        supervisor \
        curl \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install kubectl inside the container to orchestrate resources
RUN curl -LO "https://dl.k8s.io/release/v1.31.0/bin/linux/amd64/kubectl" \
    && chmod +x ./kubectl \
    && mv ./kubectl /usr/local/bin/kubectl

# Install uv from the official prebuilt binary
COPY --from=ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:latest /uv /usr/local/bin/uv

# Set working directory for the full-stack app
WORKDIR /app

# ── Backend setup ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
COPY backend/pyproject.toml backend/uv.lock* ./backend/
WORKDIR /app/backend
RUN uv sync --no-dev --frozen
COPY backend/ .

# ── Frontend setup ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
WORKDIR /app
COPY frontend/package.json frontend/bun.lock* frontend/bunfig.toml* ./frontend/
WORKDIR /app/frontend
RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile
COPY frontend/ .
RUN bun run build

# ── supervisord config ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
WORKDIR /app
COPY supervisord.conf /etc/supervisor/conf.d/app.conf

# Copy orchestrator scripts and manifests so the backend can execute deployments
COPY deploy/ /app/deploy/

RUN groupadd -g 10001 app \
    && useradd -u 10001 -g app -m -d /home/app -s /usr/sbin/nologin app \
    && chown -R app:app /app /home/app

USER app

EXPOSE 8080

CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord", "-c", "/etc/supervisor/conf.d/app.conf"]

FROM oven/bun:1-slim AS base

# Install system dependencies: Python 3, venv, supervisor

        python3 \
        python3-pip \
        python3-venv \
        supervisor \

    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -LO "https://dl.k8s.io/release/v1.31.0/bin/linux/amd64/kubectl" \
    && chmod +x ./kubectl \
    && mv ./kubectl /usr/local/bin/kubectl

WORKDIR /app/backend
RUN uv sync --no-dev --frozen
COPY backend/ .

WORKDIR /app
COPY frontend/package.json frontend/bun.lock* frontend/bunfig.toml* ./frontend/
WORKDIR /app/frontend
RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile
COPY frontend/ .
RUN bun run build

# ── supervisord config ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

COPY supervisord.conf /etc/supervisor/conf.d/app.conf

# Copy orchestrator scripts and manifests so the backend can execute deployments
COPY deploy/ /app/deploy/

RUN groupadd -g 10001 app \
    && useradd -u 10001 -g app -m -d /home/app -s /usr/sbin/nologin app \
    && chown -R app:app /app /home/app

USER app

EXPOSE 8080

CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord", "-c", "/etc/supervisor/conf.d/app.conf"]

code_block:
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1
# =============================================================================
# Combined development/production deployment image running Vite + FastAPI
# in a single container.
#
# Runs:
#   • FastAPI backend on 127.0.0.1:8000 (uvicorn)
#   • Vite SSR frontend on 0.0.0.0:8080 (bun run dev)
# =============================================================================

FROM oven/bun:1-slim AS base

# Install system dependencies: Python 3, venv, supervisor
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        python3 \
        python3-pip \
        python3-venv \
        supervisor \
        curl \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install kubectl inside the container to orchestrate resources
RUN curl -LO "https://dl.k8s.io/release/v1.31.0/bin/linux/amd64/kubectl" \
    && chmod +x ./kubectl \
    && mv ./kubectl /usr/local/bin/kubectl

# Install uv from the official prebuilt binary
COPY --from=ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:latest /uv /usr/local/bin/uv

# Set working directory for the full-stack app
WORKDIR /app

# ── Backend setup ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
COPY backend/pyproject.toml backend/uv.lock* ./backend/
WORKDIR /app/backend
RUN uv sync --no-dev --frozen
COPY backend/ .

# ── Frontend setup ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
WORKDIR /app
COPY frontend/package.json frontend/bun.lock* frontend/bunfig.toml* ./frontend/
WORKDIR /app/frontend
RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile
COPY frontend/ .
RUN bun run build

# ── supervisord config ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
WORKDIR /app
COPY supervisord.conf /etc/supervisor/conf.d/app.conf

# Copy orchestrator scripts and manifests so the backend can execute deployments
COPY deploy/ /app/deploy/

RUN groupadd -g 10001 app \
    && useradd -u 10001 -g app -m -d /home/app -s /usr/sbin/nologin app \
    && chown -R app:app /app /home/app

USER app

EXPOSE 8080

CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord", "-c", "/etc/supervisor/conf.d/app.conf"]

cd deploy/terraform
RUNNER_CIDR="${{ steps.runner_ip.outputs.ipv4 }}/32"

  -var="db_password=${{ secrets.DB_PASSWORD }}" \
  -var="api_server_authorized_ip_ranges=[\"${RUNNER_CIDR}\"]" \

steps.name: Build & Push Production Image to ACR
steps.run:
cd deploy/terraform
ACR_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw acr_login_server)
ACR_NAME=$(terraform output -raw acr_name)

# ACR Auth Login
az acr login --name $ACR_NAME

# Build Docker Image
cd ../..
docker build -t $ACR_SERVER/blue-green-gateway:latest .

# Push to ACR
docker push $ACR_SERVER/blue-green-gateway:latest

steps.name: Connect to Private AKS & Deploy Manifests
steps.run:
cd deploy/terraform
RG_NAME=$(terraform output -raw resource_group_name)
AKS_NAME=$(terraform output -raw aks_name)
KV_NAME=$(terraform output -raw key_vault_name)
DB_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw postgresql_server_name).postgres.database.azure.com
ACR_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw acr_login_server)

# Get credentials
az aks get-credentials --resource-group $RG_NAME --name $AKS_NAME

# Set database secret in Key Vault (automatically URL-encode password for connection safety)
DB_PASSWORD_ENCODED=$(python3 -c "import urllib.parse; print(urllib.parse.quote(input()))" <<< "${{ secrets.DB_PASSWORD }}")
DB_CONN="postgresql://bguser:${DB_PASSWORD_ENCODED}@$DB_SERVER:5432/postgres?sslmode=require"
az keyvault secret set --vault-name $KV_NAME --name "database-url" --value "$DB_CONN"

# Resolve Tenant ID and Client Identity
KUBELET_CLIENT_ID=$(az aks show -g $RG_NAME -n $AKS_NAME --query identityProfile.kubeletidentity.clientId -o tsv)
KUBELET_OBJECT_ID=$(az aks show -g $RG_NAME -n $AKS_NAME --query identityProfile.kubeletidentity.objectId -o tsv)
TENANT_ID=$(az account show --query tenantId -o tsv)

# Ensure kubelet identity has Key Vault secret access (idempotent)
az keyvault set-policy \
  --name $KV_NAME \
  --object-id $KUBELET_OBJECT_ID \
  --secret-permissions get list \
  --output none

# Deploy Kubernetes Manifests
cd ../kubernetes
sed -i "s/userAssignedIdentityID: \"\"/userAssignedIdentityID: \"$KUBELET_CLIENT_ID\"/g" secret-provider.yaml
sed -i "s/tenantId: \"\"/tenantId: \"$TENANT_ID\"/g" secret-provider.yaml

kubectl apply -f secret-provider.yaml

# Inject matching local Kubernetes Secrets
kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: bg-gateway-secrets
  namespace: cb
type: Opaque
stringData:
  database-url: "$DB_CONN"
EOF

# Apply placeholder Ingress if it doesn't already exist
if ! kubectl get ingress bg-gateway-ingress -n cb >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Creating placeholder ingress target..."
  kubectl apply -f ingress.yaml
fi

# Execute zero-downtime Blue/Green Deploy orchestrator
cd ..
./blue_green_deploy.sh "$ACR_SERVER/blue-green-gateway:latest"

code_block:
test-application:
    name: Test & Lint Backend (SQLite)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - name: Checkout Code
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up Python
      uses: actions/setup-python@v5
      with:
        python-version: '3.13'

    - name: Install uv
      uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v3
      with:
        enable-cache: true

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: |
        cd backend
        uv sync --frozen

    - name: Run Pytest suite
      run: |
        cd backend
        uv run pytest

  # ── JOB 1B: TEST AND LINT THE FRONTEND CODE ────────────────────────────────
  test-frontend:
    name: Test & Lint Frontend (Bun)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - name: Checkout Code
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Setup Bun
      uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
      with:
        bun-version: latest

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: |
        cd frontend
        bun install --frozen-lockfile

    - name: Run Eslint
      run: |
        cd frontend
        bun run lint

    - name: Run Vitest unit & integration tests
      run: |
        cd frontend
        bun run test

  # ── JOB 2: VALIDATE, LINT AND SECURITY SCAN INFRASTRUCTURE (TERRAFORM) ─────
  test-infrastructure:
    name: Validate & Scan Infrastructure
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - name: Checkout Code
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Azure Login
      uses: azure/login@v2
      with:
        creds: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CREDENTIALS }}

    - name: Setup Terraform
      uses: hashicorp/setup-terraform@v3
      with:
        terraform_version: 1.7.0

    - name: Check Terraform formatting
      run: |
        cd deploy/terraform
        terraform fmt -check

    - name: Initialize & Validate Terraform
      run: |
        cd deploy/terraform
        terraform init -backend=false
        terraform validate

    - name: Run Trivy vulnerability & security scanner
      uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
      with:
        scan-type: 'config'
        hide-progress: false
        format: 'table'
        exit-code: '1'
        ignore-unfixed: true
        severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'

    - name: Run Terraform HCL Unit Tests
      run: |
        cd deploy/terraform
        terraform init -backend=false
        terraform test

  # ── JOB 3: BUILD, PUSH AND GITOPS DEPLOY TO AZURE (PROD ONLY) ──────────────
  deploy-to-azure:
    name: Build & Deploy to AKS
    needs: [test-application, test-frontend, test-infrastructure]
    if: github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - name: Checkout Code
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Azure Login
      uses: azure/login@v2
      with:
        creds: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CREDENTIALS }}

    - name: Setup Terraform
      uses: hashicorp/setup-terraform@v3
      with:
        terraform_version: 1.7.0

    - name: Resolve runner egress IP for Terraform ACLs
      id: runner_ip
      run: echo "ipv4=$(curl -fsS https://api.ipify.org)" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

    - name: Apply Infrastructure (Terraform)
      run: |
        cd deploy/terraform
        RUNNER_CIDR="${{ steps.runner_ip.outputs.ipv4 }}/32"
        terraform init
        terraform apply -auto-approve \
          -var="db_password=${{ secrets.DB_PASSWORD }}" \
          -var="api_server_authorized_ip_ranges=[\"${RUNNER_CIDR}\"]" \
          -var="key_vault_allowed_ip_ranges=[\"${RUNNER_CIDR}\"]" \
          -var="key_vault_public_network_access_enabled=true"

    - name: Build & Push Production Image to ACR
      run: |
        cd deploy/terraform
        ACR_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw acr_login_server)
        ACR_NAME=$(terraform output -raw acr_name)
        
        # ACR Auth Login
        az acr login --name $ACR_NAME
        
        # Build Docker Image
        cd ../..
        docker build -t $ACR_SERVER/blue-green-gateway:latest .
        
        # Push to ACR
        docker push $ACR_SERVER/blue-green-gateway:latest

    - name: Connect to Private AKS & Deploy Manifests
      run: |
        cd deploy/terraform
        RG_NAME=$(terraform output -raw resource_group_name)
        AKS_NAME=$(terraform output -raw aks_name)
        KV_NAME=$(terraform output -raw key_vault_name)
        DB_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw postgresql_server_name).postgres.database.azure.com
        ACR_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw acr_login_server)

        # Get credentials
        az aks get-credentials --resource-group $RG_NAME --name $AKS_NAME
        
        # Set database secret in Key Vault (automatically URL-encode password for connection safety)
        DB_PASSWORD_ENCODED=$(python3 -c "import urllib.parse; print(urllib.parse.quote(input()))" <<< "${{ secrets.DB_PASSWORD }}")
        DB_CONN="postgresql://bguser:${DB_PASSWORD_ENCODED}@$DB_SERVER:5432/postgres?sslmode=require"
        az keyvault secret set --vault-name $KV_NAME --name "database-url" --value "$DB_CONN"
        
        # Resolve Tenant ID and Client Identity
        KUBELET_CLIENT_ID=$(az aks show -g $RG_NAME -n $AKS_NAME --query identityProfile.kubeletidentity.clientId -o tsv)
        KUBELET_OBJECT_ID=$(az aks show -g $RG_NAME -n $AKS_NAME --query identityProfile.kubeletidentity.objectId -o tsv)
        TENANT_ID=$(az account show --query tenantId -o tsv)

        # Ensure kubelet identity has Key Vault secret access (idempotent)
        az keyvault set-policy \
          --name $KV_NAME \
          --object-id $KUBELET_OBJECT_ID \
          --secret-permissions get list \
          --output none
        
        # Deploy Kubernetes Manifests
        cd ../kubernetes
        sed -i "s/userAssignedIdentityID: \"\"/userAssignedIdentityID: \"$KUBELET_CLIENT_ID\"/g" secret-provider.yaml
        sed -i "s/tenantId: \"\"/tenantId: \"$TENANT_ID\"/g" secret-provider.yaml
        
        kubectl apply -f secret-provider.yaml
        
        # Inject matching local Kubernetes Secrets
        kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
        apiVersion: v1
        kind: Secret
        metadata:
          name: bg-gateway-secrets
          namespace: cb
        type: Opaque
        stringData:
          database-url: "$DB_CONN"
        EOF
        
        # Apply placeholder Ingress if it doesn't already exist
        if ! kubectl get ingress bg-gateway-ingress -n cb >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          echo "Creating placeholder ingress target..."
          kubectl apply -f ingress.yaml
        fi
        
        # Execute zero-downtime Blue/Green Deploy orchestrator
        cd ..
        ./blue_green_deploy.sh "$ACR_SERVER/blue-green-gateway:latest"

        docker build -t $ACR_SERVER/blue-green-gateway:latest .
        
        # Push to ACR
        docker push $ACR_SERVER/blue-green-gateway:latest

    - name: Connect to Private AKS & Deploy Manifests
      run: |
        cd deploy/terraform
        RG_NAME=$(terraform output -raw resource_group_name)
        AKS_NAME=$(terraform output -raw aks_name)
        KV_NAME=$(terraform output -raw key_vault_name)
        DB_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw postgresql_server_name).postgres.database.azure.com
        ACR_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw acr_login_server)

        # Get credentials
        az aks get-credentials --resource-group $RG_NAME --name $AKS_NAME
        
        # Set database secret in Key Vault (automatically URL-encode password for connection safety)
        DB_PASSWORD_ENCODED=$(python3 -c "import urllib.parse; print(urllib.parse.quote(input()))" <<< "${{ secrets.DB_PASSWORD }}")
        DB_CONN="postgresql://bguser:${DB_PASSWORD_ENCODED}@$DB_SERVER:5432/postgres?sslmode=require"
        az keyvault secret set --vault-name $KV_NAME --name "database-url" --value "$DB_CONN"
        
        # Resolve Tenant ID and Client Identity
        KUBELET_CLIENT_ID=$(az aks show -g $RG_NAME -n $AKS_NAME --query identityProfile.kubeletidentity.clientId -o tsv)
        KUBELET_OBJECT_ID=$(az aks show -g $RG_NAME -n $AKS_NAME --query identityProfile.kubeletidentity.objectId -o tsv)
        TENANT_ID=$(az account show --query tenantId -o tsv)

        # Ensure kubelet identity has Key Vault secret access (idempotent)
        az keyvault set-policy \
          --name $KV_NAME \
          --object-id $KUBELET_OBJECT_ID \
          --secret-permissions get list \
          --output none
        
        # Deploy Kubernetes Manifests
        cd ../kubernetes
        sed -i "s/userAssignedIdentityID: \"\"/userAssignedIdentityID: \"$KUBELET_CLIENT_ID\"/g" secret-provider.yaml
        sed -i "s/tenantId: \"\"/tenantId: \"$TENANT_ID\"/g" secret-provider.yaml
        
        kubectl apply -f secret-provider.yaml
        
        # Inject matching local Kubernetes Secrets
        kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
        apiVersion: v1
        kind: Secret
        metadata:
          name: bg-gateway-secrets
          namespace: cb
        type: Opaque
        stringData:
          database-url: "$DB_CONN"
        EOF
        
        # Apply placeholder Ingress if it doesn't already exist
        if ! kubectl get ingress bg-gateway-ingress -n cb >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          echo "Creating placeholder ingress target..."
          kubectl apply -f ingress.yaml
        fi
        
        # Execute zero-downtime Blue/Green Deploy orchestrator
        cd ..
        ./blue_green_deploy.sh "$ACR_SERVER/blue-green-gateway:latest"

code_block:
test-application:
    name: Test & Lint Backend (SQLite)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - name: Checkout Code
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up Python
      uses: actions/setup-python@v5
      with:
        python-version: '3.13'

    - name: Install uv
      uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v3
      with:
        enable-cache: true

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: |
        cd backend
        uv sync --frozen

    - name: Run Pytest suite
      run: |
        cd backend
        uv run pytest

  # ── JOB 1B: TEST AND LINT THE FRONTEND CODE ────────────────────────────────
  test-frontend:
    name: Test & Lint Frontend (Bun)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - name: Checkout Code
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Setup Bun
      uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
      with:
        bun-version: latest

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: |
        cd frontend
        bun install --frozen-lockfile

    - name: Run Eslint
      run: |
        cd frontend
        bun run lint

    - name: Run Vitest unit & integration tests
      run: |
        cd frontend
        bun run test

  # ── JOB 2: VALIDATE, LINT AND SECURITY SCAN INFRASTRUCTURE (TERRAFORM) ─────
  test-infrastructure:
    name: Validate & Scan Infrastructure
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - name: Checkout Code
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Azure Login
      uses: azure/login@v2
      with:
        creds: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CREDENTIALS }}

    - name: Setup Terraform
      uses: hashicorp/setup-terraform@v3
      with:
        terraform_version: 1.7.0

    - name: Check Terraform formatting
      run: |
        cd deploy/terraform
        terraform fmt -check

    - name: Initialize & Validate Terraform
      run: |
        cd deploy/terraform
        terraform init -backend=false
        terraform validate

    - name: Run Trivy vulnerability & security scanner
      uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
      with:
        scan-type: 'config'
        hide-progress: false
        format: 'table'
        exit-code: '1'
        ignore-unfixed: true
        severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'

    - name: Run Terraform HCL Unit Tests
      run: |
        cd deploy/terraform
        terraform init -backend=false
        terraform test

  # ── JOB 3: BUILD, PUSH AND GITOPS DEPLOY TO AZURE (PROD ONLY) ──────────────
  deploy-to-azure:
    name: Build & Deploy to AKS
    needs: [test-application, test-frontend, test-infrastructure]
    if: github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - name: Checkout Code
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Azure Login
      uses: azure/login@v2
      with:
        creds: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CREDENTIALS }}

    - name: Setup Terraform
      uses: hashicorp/setup-terraform@v3
      with:
        terraform_version: 1.7.0

    - name: Resolve runner egress IP for Terraform ACLs
      id: runner_ip
      run: echo "ipv4=$(curl -fsS https://api.ipify.org)" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

    - name: Apply Infrastructure (Terraform)
      run: |
        cd deploy/terraform
        RUNNER_CIDR="${{ steps.runner_ip.outputs.ipv4 }}/32"
        terraform init
        terraform apply -auto-approve \
          -var="db_password=${{ secrets.DB_PASSWORD }}" \
          -var="api_server_authorized_ip_ranges=[\"${RUNNER_CIDR}\"]" \
          -var="key_vault_allowed_ip_ranges=[\"${RUNNER_CIDR}\"]" \
          -var="key_vault_public_network_access_enabled=true"

    - name: Build & Push Production Image to ACR
      run: |
        cd deploy/terraform
        ACR_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw acr_login_server)
        ACR_NAME=$(terraform output -raw acr_name)
        
        # ACR Auth Login
        az acr login --name $ACR_NAME
        
        # Build Docker Image
        cd ../..
        docker build -t $ACR_SERVER/blue-green-gateway:latest .
        
        # Push to ACR
        docker push $ACR_SERVER/blue-green-gateway:latest

    - name: Connect to Private AKS & Deploy Manifests
      run: |
        cd deploy/terraform
        RG_NAME=$(terraform output -raw resource_group_name)
        AKS_NAME=$(terraform output -raw aks_name)
        KV_NAME=$(terraform output -raw key_vault_name)
        DB_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw postgresql_server_name).postgres.database.azure.com
        ACR_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw acr_login_server)

        # Get credentials
        az aks get-credentials --resource-group $RG_NAME --name $AKS_NAME
        
        # Set database secret in Key Vault (automatically URL-encode password for connection safety)
        DB_PASSWORD_ENCODED=$(python3 -c "import urllib.parse; print(urllib.parse.quote(input()))" <<< "${{ secrets.DB_PASSWORD }}")
        DB_CONN="postgresql://bguser:${DB_PASSWORD_ENCODED}@$DB_SERVER:5432/postgres?sslmode=require"
        az keyvault secret set --vault-name $KV_NAME --name "database-url" --value "$DB_CONN"
        
        # Resolve Tenant ID and Client Identity
        KUBELET_CLIENT_ID=$(az aks show -g $RG_NAME -n $AKS_NAME --query identityProfile.kubeletidentity.clientId -o tsv)
        KUBELET_OBJECT_ID=$(az aks show -g $RG_NAME -n $AKS_NAME --query identityProfile.kubeletidentity.objectId -o tsv)
        TENANT_ID=$(az account show --query tenantId -o tsv)

        # Ensure kubelet identity has Key Vault secret access (idempotent)
        az keyvault set-policy \
          --name $KV_NAME \
          --object-id $KUBELET_OBJECT_ID \
          --secret-permissions get list \
          --output none
        
        # Deploy Kubernetes Manifests
        cd ../kubernetes
        sed -i "s/userAssignedIdentityID: \"\"/userAssignedIdentityID: \"$KUBELET_CLIENT_ID\"/g" secret-provider.yaml
        sed -i "s/tenantId: \"\"/tenantId: \"$TENANT_ID\"/g" secret-provider.yaml
        
        kubectl apply -f secret-provider.yaml
        
        # Inject matching local Kubernetes Secrets
        kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
        apiVersion: v1
        kind: Secret
        metadata:
          name: bg-gateway-secrets
          namespace: cb
        type: Opaque
        stringData:
          database-url: "$DB_CONN"
        EOF
        
        # Apply placeholder Ingress if it doesn't already exist
        if ! kubectl get ingress bg-gateway-ingress -n cb >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          echo "Creating placeholder ingress target..."
          kubectl apply -f ingress.yaml
        fi
        
        # Execute zero-downtime Blue/Green Deploy orchestrator
        cd ..
        ./blue_green_deploy.sh "$ACR_SERVER/blue-green-gateway:latest"

code_block:
name: Validate & Scan Infrastructure
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - name: Checkout Code
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Azure Login
      uses: azure/login@v2
      with:
        creds: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CREDENTIALS }}

    - name: Setup Terraform
      uses: hashicorp/setup-terraform@v3
      with:
        terraform_version: 1.7.0

    - name: Check Terraform formatting
      run: |
        cd deploy/terraform
        terraform fmt -check

    - name: Initialize & Validate Terraform
      run: |
        cd deploy/terraform
        terraform init -backend=false
        terraform validate

    - name: Run Trivy vulnerability & security scanner
      uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
      with:
        scan-type: 'config'
        hide-progress: false
        format: 'table'
        exit-code: '1'
        ignore-unfixed: true
        severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'

    - name: Run Terraform HCL Unit Tests
      run: |
        cd deploy/terraform
        terraform init -backend=false
        terraform test

  # ── JOB 3: BUILD, PUSH AND GITOPS DEPLOY TO AZURE (PROD ONLY) ──────────────
  deploy-to-azure:
    name: Build & Deploy to AKS

passed_checks.check_name: Ensure ACTIONS_ALLOW_UNSECURE_COMMANDS isn't true on environment variables

steps.name: Resolve runner egress IP for Terraform ACLs
Apply Infrastructure (Terraform)
steps.run:
cd deploy/terraform
RUNNER_CIDR="${{ steps.runner_ip.outputs.ipv4 }}/32"
terraform init
terraform apply -auto-approve \
  -var="db_password=${{ secrets.DB_PASSWORD }}" \
  -var="api_server_authorized_ip_ranges=[\"${RUNNER_CIDR}\"]" \
  -var="key_vault_allowed_ip_ranges=[\"${RUNNER_CIDR}\"]" \
  -var="key_vault_public_network_access_enabled=true"

steps.name: Build & Push Production Image to ACR
steps.run:
cd deploy/terraform
ACR_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw acr_login_server)
ACR_NAME=$(terraform output -raw acr_name)

# ACR Auth Login
az acr login --name $ACR_NAME

# Build Docker Image
cd ../..
docker build -t $ACR_SERVER/blue-green-gateway:latest .

# Push to ACR
docker push $ACR_SERVER/blue-green-gateway:latest

steps.name: Connect to Private AKS & Deploy Manifests
steps.run:
cd deploy/terraform
RG_NAME=$(terraform output -raw resource_group_name)
AKS_NAME=$(terraform output -raw aks_name)
KV_NAME=$(terraform output -raw key_vault_name)
DB_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw postgresql_server_name).postgres.database.azure.com
ACR_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw acr_login_server)

# Get credentials
az aks get-credentials --resource-group $RG_NAME --name $AKS_NAME

# Set database secret in Key Vault (automatically URL-encode password for connection safety)
DB_PASSWORD_ENCODED=$(python3 -c "import urllib.parse; print(urllib.parse.quote(input()))" <<< "${{ secrets.DB_PASSWORD }}")
DB_CONN="postgresql://bguser:${DB_PASSWORD_ENCODED}@$DB_SERVER:5432/postgres?sslmode=require"
az keyvault secret set --vault-name $KV_NAME --name "database-url" --value "$DB_CONN"

# Resolve Tenant ID and Client Identity
KUBELET_CLIENT_ID=$(az aks show -g $RG_NAME -n $AKS_NAME --query identityProfile.kubeletidentity.clientId -o tsv)
KUBELET_OBJECT_ID=$(az aks show -g $RG_NAME -n $AKS_NAME --query identityProfile.kubeletidentity.objectId -o tsv)
TENANT_ID=$(az account show --query tenantId -o tsv)

# Ensure kubelet identity has Key Vault secret access (idempotent)
az keyvault set-policy \
  --name $KV_NAME \
  --object-id $KUBELET_OBJECT_ID \
  --secret-permissions get list \
  --output none

# Deploy Kubernetes Manifests
cd ../kubernetes
sed -i "s/userAssignedIdentityID: \"\"/userAssignedIdentityID: \"$KUBELET_CLIENT_ID\"/g" secret-provider.yaml
sed -i "s/tenantId: \"\"/tenantId: \"$TENANT_ID\"/g" secret-provider.yaml

kubectl apply -f secret-provider.yaml

# Inject matching local Kubernetes Secrets
kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: bg-gateway-secrets
  namespace: cb
type: Opaque
stringData:
  database-url: "$DB_CONN"
EOF

# Apply placeholder Ingress if it doesn't already exist
if ! kubectl get ingress bg-gateway-ingress -n cb >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Creating placeholder ingress target..."
  kubectl apply -f ingress.yaml
fi

# Execute zero-downtime Blue/Green Deploy orchestrator
cd ..
./blue_green_deploy.sh "$ACR_SERVER/blue-green-gateway:latest"

code_block:
name: Build & Deploy to AKS
    needs: [test-application, test-frontend, test-infrastructure]
    if: github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - name: Checkout Code
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Azure Login
      uses: azure/login@v2
      with:
        creds: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CREDENTIALS }}

    - name: Setup Terraform
      uses: hashicorp/setup-terraform@v3
      with:
        terraform_version: 1.7.0

    - name: Resolve runner egress IP for Terraform ACLs
      id: runner_ip
      run: echo "ipv4=$(curl -fsS https://api.ipify.org)" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

    - name: Apply Infrastructure (Terraform)
      run: |
        cd deploy/terraform
        RUNNER_CIDR="${{ steps.runner_ip.outputs.ipv4 }}/32"
        terraform init
        terraform apply -auto-approve \
          -var="db_password=${{ secrets.DB_PASSWORD }}" \
          -var="api_server_authorized_ip_ranges=[\"${RUNNER_CIDR}\"]" \
          -var="key_vault_allowed_ip_ranges=[\"${RUNNER_CIDR}\"]" \
          -var="key_vault_public_network_access_enabled=true"

    - name: Build & Push Production Image to ACR
      run: |
        cd deploy/terraform
        ACR_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw acr_login_server)
        ACR_NAME=$(terraform output -raw acr_name)
        
        # ACR Auth Login
        az acr login --name $ACR_NAME
        
        # Build Docker Image
        cd ../..
        docker build -t $ACR_SERVER/blue-green-gateway:latest .
        
        # Push to ACR
        docker push $ACR_SERVER/blue-green-gateway:latest

    - name: Connect to Private AKS & Deploy Manifests
      run: |
        cd deploy/terraform
        RG_NAME=$(terraform output -raw resource_group_name)
        AKS_NAME=$(terraform output -raw aks_name)
        KV_NAME=$(terraform output -raw key_vault_name)
        DB_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw postgresql_server_name).postgres.database.azure.com
        ACR_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw acr_login_server)

        # Get credentials
        az aks get-credentials --resource-group $RG_NAME --name $AKS_NAME
        
        # Set database secret in Key Vault (automatically URL-encode password for connection safety)
        DB_PASSWORD_ENCODED=$(python3 -c "import urllib.parse; print(urllib.parse.quote(input()))" <<< "${{ secrets.DB_PASSWORD }}")
        DB_CONN="postgresql://bguser:${DB_PASSWORD_ENCODED}@$DB_SERVER:5432/postgres?sslmode=require"
        az keyvault secret set --vault-name $KV_NAME --name "database-url" --value "$DB_CONN"
        
        # Resolve Tenant ID and Client Identity
        KUBELET_CLIENT_ID=$(az aks show -g $RG_NAME -n $AKS_NAME --query identityProfile.kubeletidentity.clientId -o tsv)
        KUBELET_OBJECT_ID=$(az aks show -g $RG_NAME -n $AKS_NAME --query identityProfile.kubeletidentity.objectId -o tsv)
        TENANT_ID=$(az account show --query tenantId -o tsv)

        # Ensure kubelet identity has Key Vault secret access (idempotent)
        az keyvault set-policy \
          --name $KV_NAME \
          --object-id $KUBELET_OBJECT_ID \
          --secret-permissions get list \
          --output none
        
        # Deploy Kubernetes Manifests
        cd ../kubernetes
        sed -i "s/userAssignedIdentityID: \"\"/userAssignedIdentityID: \"$KUBELET_CLIENT_ID\"/g" secret-provider.yaml
        sed -i "s/tenantId: \"\"/tenantId: \"$TENANT_ID\"/g" secret-provider.yaml
        
        kubectl apply -f secret-provider.yaml
        
        # Inject matching local Kubernetes Secrets
        kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
        apiVersion: v1
        kind: Secret
        metadata:
          name: bg-gateway-secrets
          namespace: cb
        type: Opaque
        stringData:
          database-url: "$DB_CONN"
        EOF
        
        # Apply placeholder Ingress if it doesn't already exist
        if ! kubectl get ingress bg-gateway-ingress -n cb >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          echo "Creating placeholder ingress target..."
          kubectl apply -f ingress.yaml
        fi
        
        # Execute zero-downtime Blue/Green Deploy orchestrator
        cd ..
        ./blue_green_deploy.sh "$ACR_SERVER/blue-green-gateway:latest"

results_configuration.name: Connect to Private AKS & Deploy Manifests
results_configuration.run:
cd deploy/terraform
RG_NAME=$(terraform output -raw resource_group_name)
AKS_NAME=$(terraform output -raw aks_name)
KV_NAME=$(terraform output -raw key_vault_name)
DB_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw postgresql_server_name).postgres.database.azure.com
ACR_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw acr_login_server)

# Get credentials
az aks get-credentials --resource-group $RG_NAME --name $AKS_NAME

# Set database secret in Key Vault (automatically URL-encode password for connection safety)
DB_PASSWORD_ENCODED=$(python3 -c "import urllib.parse; print(urllib.parse.quote(input()))" <<< "${{ secrets.DB_PASSWORD }}")
DB_CONN="postgresql://bguser:${DB_PASSWORD_ENCODED}@$DB_SERVER:5432/postgres?sslmode=require"
az keyvault secret set --vault-name $KV_NAME --name "database-url" --value "$DB_CONN"

# Resolve Tenant ID and Client Identity
KUBELET_CLIENT_ID=$(az aks show -g $RG_NAME -n $AKS_NAME --query identityProfile.kubeletidentity.clientId -o tsv)
KUBELET_OBJECT_ID=$(az aks show -g $RG_NAME -n $AKS_NAME --query identityProfile.kubeletidentity.objectId -o tsv)
TENANT_ID=$(az account show --query tenantId -o tsv)

# Ensure kubelet identity has Key Vault secret access (idempotent)
az keyvault set-policy \
  --name $KV_NAME \
  --object-id $KUBELET_OBJECT_ID \
  --secret-permissions get list \
  --output none

# Deploy Kubernetes Manifests
cd ../kubernetes
sed -i "s/userAssignedIdentityID: \"\"/userAssignedIdentityID: \"$KUBELET_CLIENT_ID\"/g" secret-provider.yaml
sed -i "s/tenantId: \"\"/tenantId: \"$TENANT_ID\"/g" secret-provider.yaml

kubectl apply -f secret-provider.yaml

# Inject matching local Kubernetes Secrets
kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: bg-gateway-secrets
  namespace: cb
type: Opaque
stringData:
  database-url: "$DB_CONN"
EOF

# Apply placeholder Ingress if it doesn't already exist
if ! kubectl get ingress bg-gateway-ingress -n cb >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Creating placeholder ingress target..."
  kubectl apply -f ingress.yaml
fi

# Execute zero-downtime Blue/Green Deploy orchestrator
cd ..
./blue_green_deploy.sh "$ACR_SERVER/blue-green-gateway:latest"

        DB_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw postgresql_server_name).postgres.database.azure.com
        ACR_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw acr_login_server)

        # Get credentials
        az aks get-credentials --resource-group $RG_NAME --name $AKS_NAME
        
        # Set database secret in Key Vault (automatically URL-encode password for connection safety)
        DB_PASSWORD_ENCODED=$(python3 -c "import urllib.parse; print(urllib.parse.quote(input()))" <<< "${{ secrets.DB_PASSWORD }}")
        DB_CONN="postgresql://bguser:${DB_PASSWORD_ENCODED}@$DB_SERVER:5432/postgres?sslmode=require"
        az keyvault secret set --vault-name $KV_NAME --name "database-url" --value "$DB_CONN"
        
        # Resolve Tenant ID and Client Identity
        KUBELET_CLIENT_ID=$(az aks show -g $RG_NAME -n $AKS_NAME --query identityProfile.kubeletidentity.clientId -o tsv)
        KUBELET_OBJECT_ID=$(az aks show -g $RG_NAME -n $AKS_NAME --query identityProfile.kubeletidentity.objectId -o tsv)
        TENANT_ID=$(az account show --query tenantId -o tsv)

        # Ensure kubelet identity has Key Vault secret access (idempotent)
        az keyvault set-policy \
          --name $KV_NAME \
          --object-id $KUBELET_OBJECT_ID \
          --secret-permissions get list \
          --output none
        
        # Deploy Kubernetes Manifests
        cd ../kubernetes
        sed -i "s/userAssignedIdentityID: \"\"/userAssignedIdentityID: \"$KUBELET_CLIENT_ID\"/g" secret-provider.yaml
        sed -i "s/tenantId: \"\"/tenantId: \"$TENANT_ID\"/g" secret-provider.yaml
        
        kubectl apply -f secret-provider.yaml
        
        # Inject matching local Kubernetes Secrets
        kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
        apiVersion: v1
        kind: Secret
        metadata:
          name: bg-gateway-secrets
          namespace: cb
        type: Opaque
        stringData:
          database-url: "$DB_CONN"
        EOF
        
        # Apply placeholder Ingress if it doesn't already exist
        if ! kubectl get ingress bg-gateway-ingress -n cb >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          echo "Creating placeholder ingress target..."
          kubectl apply -f ingress.yaml
        fi
        
        # Execute zero-downtime Blue/Green Deploy orchestrator
        cd ..
        ./blue_green_deploy.sh "$ACR_SERVER/blue-green-gateway:latest"

results_configuration.name: Connect to Private AKS & Deploy Manifests
results_configuration.run:
cd deploy/terraform
RG_NAME=$(terraform output -raw resource_group_name)
AKS_NAME=$(terraform output -raw aks_name)
KV_NAME=$(terraform output -raw key_vault_name)
DB_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw postgresql_server_name).postgres.database.azure.com
ACR_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw acr_login_server)

# Get credentials
az aks get-credentials --resource-group $RG_NAME --name $AKS_NAME

# Set database secret in Key Vault (automatically URL-encode password for connection safety)
DB_PASSWORD_ENCODED=$(python3 -c "import urllib.parse; print(urllib.parse.quote(input()))" <<< "${{ secrets.DB_PASSWORD }}")
DB_CONN="postgresql://bguser:${DB_PASSWORD_ENCODED}@$DB_SERVER:5432/postgres?sslmode=require"
az keyvault secret set --vault-name $KV_NAME --name "database-url" --value "$DB_CONN"

# Resolve Tenant ID and Client Identity
KUBELET_CLIENT_ID=$(az aks show -g $RG_NAME -n $AKS_NAME --query identityProfile.kubeletidentity.clientId -o tsv)
KUBELET_OBJECT_ID=$(az aks show -g $RG_NAME -n $AKS_NAME --query identityProfile.kubeletidentity.objectId -o tsv)
TENANT_ID=$(az account show --query tenantId -o tsv)

# Ensure kubelet identity has Key Vault secret access (idempotent)
az keyvault set-policy \
  --name $KV_NAME \
  --object-id $KUBELET_OBJECT_ID \
  --secret-permissions get list \
  --output none

# Deploy Kubernetes Manifests
cd ../kubernetes
sed -i "s/userAssignedIdentityID: \"\"/userAssignedIdentityID: \"$KUBELET_CLIENT_ID\"/g" secret-provider.yaml
sed -i "s/tenantId: \"\"/tenantId: \"$TENANT_ID\"/g" secret-provider.yaml

kubectl apply -f secret-provider.yaml

# Inject matching local Kubernetes Secrets
kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: bg-gateway-secrets
  namespace: cb
type: Opaque
stringData:
  database-url: "$DB_CONN"
EOF

# Apply placeholder Ingress if it doesn't already exist
if ! kubectl get ingress bg-gateway-ingress -n cb >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Creating placeholder ingress target..."
  kubectl apply -f ingress.yaml
fi

# Execute zero-downtime Blue/Green Deploy orchestrator
cd ..
./blue_green_deploy.sh "$ACR_SERVER/blue-green-gateway:latest"

code_block:
- name: Connect to Private AKS & Deploy Manifests
      run: |
        cd deploy/terraform
        RG_NAME=$(terraform output -raw resource_group_name)
        AKS_NAME=$(terraform output -raw aks_name)
        KV_NAME=$(terraform output -raw key_vault_name)
        DB_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw postgresql_server_name).postgres.database.azure.com
        ACR_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw acr_login_server)

        # Get credentials
        az aks get-credentials --resource-group $RG_NAME --name $AKS_NAME
        
        # Set database secret in Key Vault (automatically URL-encode password for connection safety)
        DB_PASSWORD_ENCODED=$(python3 -c "import urllib.parse; print(urllib.parse.quote(input()))" <<< "${{ secrets.DB_PASSWORD }}")
        DB_CONN="postgresql://bguser:${DB_PASSWORD_ENCODED}@$DB_SERVER:5432/postgres?sslmode=require"
        az keyvault secret set --vault-name $KV_NAME --name "database-url" --value "$DB_CONN"
        
        # Resolve Tenant ID and Client Identity
        KUBELET_CLIENT_ID=$(az aks show -g $RG_NAME -n $AKS_NAME --query identityProfile.kubeletidentity.clientId -o tsv)
        KUBELET_OBJECT_ID=$(az aks show -g $RG_NAME -n $AKS_NAME --query identityProfile.kubeletidentity.objectId -o tsv)
        TENANT_ID=$(az account show --query tenantId -o tsv)

        # Ensure kubelet identity has Key Vault secret access (idempotent)
        az keyvault set-policy \
          --name $KV_NAME \
          --object-id $KUBELET_OBJECT_ID \
          --secret-permissions get list \
          --output none
        
        # Deploy Kubernetes Manifests
        cd ../kubernetes
        sed -i "s/userAssignedIdentityID: \"\"/userAssignedIdentityID: \"$KUBELET_CLIENT_ID\"/g" secret-provider.yaml
        sed -i "s/tenantId: \"\"/tenantId: \"$TENANT_ID\"/g" secret-provider.yaml
        
        kubectl apply -f secret-provider.yaml
        
        # Inject matching local Kubernetes Secrets
        kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
        apiVersion: v1
        kind: Secret
        metadata:
          name: bg-gateway-secrets
          namespace: cb
        type: Opaque
        stringData:
          database-url: "$DB_CONN"
        EOF
        
        # Apply placeholder Ingress if it doesn't already exist
        if ! kubectl get ingress bg-gateway-ingress -n cb >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          echo "Creating placeholder ingress target..."
          kubectl apply -f ingress.yaml
        fi
        
        # Execute zero-downtime Blue/Green Deploy orchestrator
        cd ..
        ./blue_green_deploy.sh "$ACR_SERVER/blue-green-gateway:latest"

TENANT_ID=$(az account show --query tenantId -o tsv)

# Ensure kubelet identity has Key Vault secret access (idempotent)
az keyvault set-policy \
  --name $KV_NAME \
  --object-id $KUBELET_OBJECT_ID \
  --secret-permissions get list \
  --output none

# Deploy Kubernetes Manifests
cd ../kubernetes
sed -i "s/userAssignedIdentityID: \"\"/userAssignedIdentityID: \"$KUBELET_CLIENT_ID\"/g" secret-provider.yaml
sed -i "s/tenantId: \"\"/tenantId: \"$TENANT_ID\"/g" secret-provider.yaml

kubectl apply -f secret-provider.yaml

# Inject matching local Kubernetes Secrets
kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: bg-gateway-secrets
  namespace: cb
type: Opaque
stringData:
  database-url: "$DB_CONN"
EOF

# Apply placeholder Ingress if it doesn't already exist
if ! kubectl get ingress bg-gateway-ingress -n cb >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Creating placeholder ingress target..."
  kubectl apply -f ingress.yaml
fi

# Execute zero-downtime Blue/Green Deploy orchestrator
cd ..
./blue_green_deploy.sh "$ACR_SERVER/blue-green-gateway:latest"

code_block:
- name: Connect to Private AKS & Deploy Manifests
      run: |
        cd deploy/terraform
        RG_NAME=$(terraform output -raw resource_group_name)
        AKS_NAME=$(terraform output -raw aks_name)
        KV_NAME=$(terraform output -raw key_vault_name)
        DB_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw postgresql_server_name).postgres.database.azure.com
        ACR_SERVER=$(terraform output -raw acr_login_server)

        # Get credentials
        az aks get-credentials --resource-group $RG_NAME --name $AKS_NAME
        
        # Set database secret in Key Vault (automatically URL-encode password for connection safety)
        DB_PASSWORD_ENCODED=$(python3 -c "import urllib.parse; print(urllib.parse.quote(input()))" <<< "${{ secrets.DB_PASSWORD }}")
        DB_CONN="postgresql://bguser:${DB_PASSWORD_ENCODED}@$DB_SERVER:5432/postgres?sslmode=require"
        az keyvault secret set --vault-name $KV_NAME --name "database-url" --value "$DB_CONN"
        
        # Resolve Tenant ID and Client Identity
        KUBELET_CLIENT_ID=$(az aks show -g $RG_NAME -n $AKS_NAME --query identityProfile.kubeletidentity.clientId -o tsv)
        KUBELET_OBJECT_ID=$(az aks show -g $RG_NAME -n $AKS_NAME --query identityProfile.kubeletidentity.objectId -o tsv)
        TENANT_ID=$(az account show --query tenantId -o tsv)

        # Ensure kubelet identity has Key Vault secret access (idempotent)
        az keyvault set-policy \
          --name $KV_NAME \
          --object-id $KUBELET_OBJECT_ID \
          --secret-permissions get list \
          --output none
        
        # Deploy Kubernetes Manifests
        cd ../kubernetes
        sed -i "s/userAssignedIdentityID: \"\"/userAssignedIdentityID: \"$KUBELET_CLIENT_ID\"/g" secret-provider.yaml
        sed -i "s/tenantId: \"\"/tenantId: \"$TENANT_ID\"/g" secret-provider.yaml
        
        kubectl apply -f secret-provider.yaml
        
        # Inject matching local Kubernetes Secrets
        kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
        apiVersion: v1
        kind: Secret
        metadata:
          name: bg-gateway-secrets
          namespace: cb
        type: Opaque
        stringData:
          database-url: "$DB_CONN"
        EOF
        
        # Apply placeholder Ingress if it doesn't already exist
        if ! kubectl get ingress bg-gateway-ingress -n cb >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          echo "Creating placeholder ingress target..."
          kubectl apply -f ingress.yaml
        fi
        
        # Execute zero-downtime Blue/Green Deploy orchestrator
        cd ..
        ./blue_green_deploy.sh "$ACR_SERVER/blue-green-gateway:latest"

info.title: Blue/Green Gateway API
info.description: Backend API for the Blue/Green Deployment UI

get.description: Returns the full state including environments, pipeline config, and current progress.

post.description: Starts the transition from Blue to Green environment.
Resets the state back to the vulnerable Blue environment.

deploying.description: Whether a deployment is currently in progress

step.description: Current step index of the pipeline

code_block:
openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  title: Blue/Green Gateway API
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Backend API for the Blue/Green Deployment UI
servers:
  - url: /api
paths:
  /state:
    get:
      summary: Get the current deployment state
      description: Returns the full state including environments, pipeline config, and current progress.
      operationId: getState
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful response
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/StateResponse'
  /deploy:
    post:
      summary: Trigger the deployment
      description: Starts the transition from Blue to Green environment.
      operationId: triggerDeploy
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Deployment started
  /reset:
    post:
      summary: Reset the deployment
      description: Resets the state back to the vulnerable Blue environment.
      operationId: resetDeployment
      responses:
        '200':
          description: State reset

components:
  schemas:
    StateResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        active:
          type: string
          enum: [blue, green]
          description: The currently active environment
        deploying:
          type: boolean
          description: Whether a deployment is currently in progress
        step:
          type: integer
          description: Current step index of the pipeline
        logs:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: List of deployment logs
        environments:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Environments'
        config:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/AppConfig'
      required:
        - active
        - deploying
        - step
        - logs
        - environments
        - config

    Environments:
      type: object
      properties:
        blue:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Environment'
        green:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Environment'
      required:
        - blue
        - green

    Environment:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          enum: [blue, green]
        label:
          type: string
        version:
          type: string
        ip:
          type: string
        image:
          type: string
        node:
          type: string
        region:
          type: string
        vuln:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        mitre:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        patchedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
        commit:
          type: string
      required:
        - name
        - label
        - version
        - ip
        - image
        - node
        - region
        - commit

    AppConfig:
      type: object
      properties:
        site:
          type: string
        repo:
          type: string
        pipelineSteps:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        vulnerableCode:
          type: string
        patchedCode:
          type: string
        initialLogs:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
      required:
        - site
        - repo
        - pipelineSteps
        - vulnerableCode
        - patchedCode
        - initialLogs
